features: SOAK AWAY ACHES & PAINS: Elysium Spa Muscle & Bath Soak with Menthol, relieves tired, aching muscles, eases breathing. Re-sealable pack. Suitable for all skin types, use regularly to revive fatigued muscles
SOOTHING & RELAXING: Add two handfuls of Elysium Spa Muscle & Bath Soak with Natural Hemp Oil to a warm, running bath water for a wonderfully soothing and relaxing bath
QUICK RELAXING BATH: Soak for only a minimum of 20 minutes in a warm bath with Elysium Spa Muscle & Bath Soak with Natural Hemp Oil to soften skin and to be absorbed
POST WORKOUT MUSCLE RELIEF: Use Elysium Spa Muscle & Bath Soak after running, cycling, gardening, ora gym visit to relax the aches and pains, to leave you feeling revived
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Elysium Spa Muscle & Bath Soak with Menthol, 450g re-sealable pack. Search amazon.co.uk for a range of Elysium Spa products
description: Product Description Elysium Spa Muscle & Bath Soak with Menthol, relieves tired, aching muscles, eases breathing. Re-sealable pack. Suitable for all skin types, use regularly to revive fatigued muscles. Add two handfuls of Elysium Spa Muscle & Bath Soak with Natural Hemp Oil to a warm, running bath water for a wonderfully soothing and relaxing bath. Soak for only a minimum of 20 minutes in a warm bath with Elysium Spa Muscle & Bath Soak with Natural Hemp Oil to soften skin and to be absorbed. Use Elysium Spa Muscle & Bath Soak after running, cycling, gardening, or a gym visit to relax the aches and pains, to leave you feeling revived. Elysium Spa Muscle & Bath Soak with Menthol, 450g re-sealable pack. Search amazon.co.uk for a range of Elysium Spa products Directions Add two handfuls of Elysium Spa Muscle & Bath Soak with Natural Hemp Oil to a warm, running bath water for a wonderfully soothing and relaxing bath. Soak for only a minimum of 20 minutes in a warm bath with Elysium Spa Muscle & Bath Soak with Natural Hemp Oil to soften skin and to be absorbed. Safety Warning May cause skin irritation. Avoid contact with eyes. Do not use on broken skin. Keep out of reach of children. Always test on a small area of skin before use. Rinse thoroughly after use. Do not use in a bath with a child under 5 years old. Avoid using in a hot bath or for extended periods to prevent overheating. See more
